scenario.note: expansion = persona/paraphrase multiplier (~10x) via eliza-scenarios list --count-scenarios; base = existing scenario ids. Harvest targets base ids (expansion optional).

benchmark.note: 53 adapters over 45 benchmark dirs (registry/commands.py). Each benchmark has its own problem/task count (e.g. bfcl ~2k calls, tau_bench airline/retail, mint tasks). Per-benchmark N lives in each suite README; NOT a fixed number. ~25 route through eliza-adapter (real runtime) and are trajectory-harvestable after wiring.

e2e.note: 51 *.live.e2e.test.ts / *.real.e2e.test.ts vitest files. Each file has multiple it() cases. Verdict granularity = vitest pass/fail per file. Trajectory-harvestable after ELIZA_SAVE_TRAJECTORIES wiring.

fullRunCostEstimate.note: 978 base scenario runs (10,716 if fully expanded), each a full AgentRuntime+PGLite boot with 1-N gpt-5.5 turns. At ~1-3 model calls/scenario => ~1k-30k gpt-5.5 calls for scenarios alone. Benchmarks add thousands more (bfcl/tau/mint). This is why Stage 1 proves on a small slice only.
